name: Memok AI Memory
description: Persist OpenClaw conversations into the memok-ai SQLite memory system. 中文：将 OpenClaw 对话写入 memok-ai 记忆库。

llmProvider.label: LLM provider (供应商)
llmProvider.help: OpenAI-compatible preset; choose inherit to use only gateway env OPENAI_* / MEMOK_LLM_MODEL. 中文：选 inherit 则不在此写密钥，仅用环境变量。

llmApiKey.label: API Key
llmApiKey.help: Maps to OPENAI_API_KEY when not already set in the process. Same semantics as the OpenAI SDK (Zhipu, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, etc.). 中文：未设置进程环境变量时写入 OPENAI_API_KEY。

llmBaseUrl.label: Custom Base URL
llmBaseUrl.help: Used when llmProvider is custom; maps to OPENAI_BASE_URL. 中文：仅 custom 时填写，对应 OPENAI_BASE_URL。

llmModel.label: Default model
llmModel.help: Manual model name (overrides preset when set); maps to MEMOK_LLM_MODEL. Prefer non-reasoning models. 中文：手填模型名，建议非 reasoning/think。

llmModelPreset.label: Model preset (recommended)
llmModelPreset.help: Pick a provider first, then a common non-reasoning model; used only when llmModel is empty. 中文：llmModel 留空时生效。

dreamingPipelineDailyAt.label: Daily dreaming time
dreamingPipelineDailyAt.help: Daily HH:mm; no cron syntax needed. When dreamingPipelineCron is empty, schedule is derived from this field. 中文：每日发梦时间 HH:mm。

articleWordImportInitialWeight.label: Initial sentence weight (import)
articleWordImportInitialWeight.help: Written to config.toml: initial weight for new sentences from article-word pipeline; positive integer; omit for memok-ai default (usually 1). 中文：落库句子初始 weight。

articleWordImportInitialDuration.label: Initial sentence duration (import)
articleWordImportInitialDuration.help: Written to config.toml: initial duration for new sentences; positive integer; omit for memok-ai default (usually 7). 中文：落库句子初始 duration。

dreamShortTermToLongTermWeightThreshold.label: Dreaming: short→long-term weight threshold
dreamShortTermToLongTermWeightThreshold.help: Written to config.toml: in predream, short-term rows with weight ≥ this value promote to long-term; positive integer; omit for core default 7. 中文：predream 短期升长期阈值。

relevanceScoreMaxLlmAttempts.label: Relevance score: max LLM attempts
relevanceScoreMaxLlmAttempts.help: Written to config.toml: max retry attempts when LLM relevance scoring fails; positive integer; omit for core default 5 (max 32). 中文：相关性评分 LLM 失败最大重试次数。

dbPath.description: SQLite database path. 中文：SQLite 数据库路径。

llmProvider.description: OpenAI-compatible LLM: inherit leaves Base URL unset (use env); presets fill OPENAI_BASE_URL; custom uses llmBaseUrl. 中文：inherit 用环境；各预设自动 Base URL；custom 用手填 URL。

llmApiKey.description: Maps to OPENAI_API_KEY when not already set in the process. 中文：映射到 OPENAI_API_KEY（仅当未设置时）。

llmBaseUrl.description: When llmProvider=custom, maps to OPENAI_BASE_URL (include /v1 per vendor docs). 中文：custom 时的 OPENAI_BASE_URL。

llmModel.description: Maps to MEMOK_LLM_MODEL when not already set. 中文：映射到 MEMOK_LLM_MODEL。

llmModelPreset.description: Preset dropdown; prefer non-reasoning models. Used when llmModel is empty. 中文：模型预设，llmModel 留空时映射到 MEMOK_LLM_MODEL。

enabled.description: Enable the plugin (persist + recall); false disables registration. 中文：为 false 时整插件不注册。

memoryInjectEnabled.description: Enable candidate memory injection (skill/tools or prepend); independent of persist. 中文：候选记忆注入，与落库独立。

memoryRecallMode.description: skill: appendSystemContext each turn + tools. skill+hint: same plus short prepend hint. prepend: legacy full prependContext. 中文：skill/skill+hint/prepend 三种召回展示模式。

persistTranscriptToMemory.description: Write conversation transcripts to SQLite each turn (default true). Recall markers are stripped before persist. 中文：每轮落库；@@@MEMOK_RECALL_*@@@ 会先剥离。

extractFraction.description: Sampling fraction over the words table for recall (same idea as extract-memory-sentences). 中文：words 表抽样比例。

longTermFraction.description: Weighted sampling fraction on the non-short-term pool; defaults to extractFraction. 中文：非短期池抽样比例。

maxInjectChars.description: Max characters for a single prependContext inject (guardrail). 中文：单次注入最大字符数。

dreamingPipelineScheduleEnabled.description: Run dreaming-pipeline on a cron inside the gateway (predream + story; calls LLM). Default false. 中文：网关内定时发梦，默认关。

dreamingPipelineDailyAt.description: Daily trigger HH:mm. When dreamingPipelineCron is unset, cron is derived from this; plugin default time 03:00 if both unset. 中文：每日 HH:mm 触发发梦。

dreamingPipelineCron.description: Optional 5-field cron (overrides dreamingPipelineDailyAt). Usually leave empty and use HH:mm only. 中文：可选 cron，优先级高于每日时间。

dreamingPipelineTimezone.description: IANA timezone (e.g. Asia/Shanghai); omit for system local timezone when interpreting cron. 中文：IANA 时区。

dreamingPipelineMaxWords.description: Story stage max words (CLI --max-words). 中文：story 段抽词上限。

dreamingPipelineFraction.description: Story stage sampling fraction (--fraction). 中文：story 段抽样比例。

dreamingPipelineMinRuns.description: Min random story runs (--min-runs). 中文：多轮 story 下限。

dreamingPipelineMaxRuns.description: Max random story runs (--max-runs). 中文：多轮 story 上限。

articleWordImportInitialWeight.description: Initial weight for new sentences from article-word (written to config.toml; MemokPipelineConfig). 中文：新插入 sentences 初始 weight。

articleWordImportInitialDuration.description: Initial duration for new sentences (written to config.toml). 中文：新插入 duration。

dreamShortTermToLongTermWeightThreshold.description: Predream threshold: short-term rows with weight ≥ this promote to long-term (written to config.toml; core default 7). 中文：短期升长期 weight 阈值。

relevanceScoreMaxLlmAttempts.description: Max LLM retry attempts for relevance scoring (written to config.toml; core default 5). 中文：相关性评分 LLM 失败最大重试次数。
